title: Ready, Steady, Go!

sections.heading: WHAT YOU'LL NEED TO PLAY
sections.middleText1:
two switches
record:
"ready, steady" on one switch 
"go!" on the other
sections.middleText2:
race course and finish line
race cars e.g. students in wheelchairs, model cars or plush toys

sections.heading: HOW TO PLAY
sections.body:
1. When the switch user presses "ready, steady", get the activity ready, e.g. shake their wheelchair like an engine starting.
2. When they press "go!", complete the action, e.g. push their wheelchair towards the finish line.

tooltipText: Activate 2 switches to say "ready, steady" and "GO!" to join in a race
